posts.author: sbrissandrea (Andrea)
posts.cookedHtml:
Good morning,
I am asking you about the calendar view in monday.com CRM. In this case, for each customer there are subtasks, specifically 4:

  • create quote
  • set meeting
  • send contract
  • start work

And I would like to put these tasks in a better view. Now to see them I have to go to the main board to list and expand all the items to see what tasks there are to do and filter them by the date I want. A bit inconvenient. Would it be possible to have a calendar view done right of these tasks?

Schermata 2024-02-28 alle 09.44.582298×1458 362 KB

As you can see in the picture, the view appears like this:

  • the whole name of the item/subitem comes out in full. A bit too long
  • If I open a task to change the date or status, it won’t let me change it
  • If I have more than 5 tasks in a day, it won’t let me scroll through the day box to see more.

If I click on the Item, appare like this and to change the status/date I have to go to the list of items.

Schermata 2024-02-28 alle 09.51.582842×1572 267 KB

So I ask you: what can I do? I would be very comfortable with the calendar view. I also used it in Asana and it is spectacular. Thank you!!
